title: Strait of Hormuz | From Vital Energy Chokepoint to Pressure Point
section_path: Strait of Hormuz | From Vital Energy Chokepoint to Pressure Point
section_path_text: Strait of Hormuz | From Vital Energy Chokepoint to Pressure Point
summary:
Main
The sustained tensions since Saturday continue to diminish the prospects for de-escalation. Image reference: unnamed.png | assets/2026-03-06_strait-of-hormuz-from-vital-energy-chokepoint-to-pressure-point_img_unnamed_ba9e7288ccf8.png
Tensions around the Strait of Hormuz are increasingly spilling into global oil markets, raising concerns about potential disruptions to one of the world's most critical energy transit routes. As regional tensions evolve, the central question for markets is no longer whether disruptions may occur, but how long they could persist.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
The sustained tensions since Saturday continue to diminish the prospects for de-escalation. Image reference: unnamed.png | assets/2026-03-06_strait-of-hormuz-from-vital-energy-chokepoint-to-pressure-point_img_unnamed_ba9e7288ccf8.png
Tensions around the Strait of Hormuz are increasingly spilling into global oil markets, raising concerns about potential disruptions to one of the world's most critical energy transit routes.

children.title: Ship Traffic Has Nearly Stopped in the Strait of Hormuz
section_path: Ship Traffic Has Nearly Stopped in the Strait of Hormuz
children.section_path_text: Ship Traffic Has Nearly Stopped in the Strait of Hormuz
children.summary: The Strait of Hormuz has long been central to geopolitical tensions affecting global oil markets. While the Strait has never experienced a prolonged closure, periods of escalation have historically influenced shipping costs and operational conditions across the Gulf.

children.title: Bunker Fuel Prices Spike in Fujairah
section_path: Bunker Fuel Prices Spike in Fujairah
children.section_path_text: Bunker Fuel Prices Spike in Fujairah
children.summary: Bunker fuel prices in Fujairah have risen sharply over the past week, with VLSFO reaching $610/ton on 5 March, up 22% WoW . Image reference: unnamed (3).png | assets/2026-03-06_strait-of-hormuz-from-vital-energy-chokepoint-to-pressure-point_img_unnamed28329_622f0d070c84.png

children.title: Hormuz Disruptions Push AG Congestion Higher
section_path: Hormuz Disruptions Push AG Congestion Higher
children.section_path_text: Hormuz Disruptions Push AG Congestion Higher
children.summary:
Security disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz appear to be pushing up Arabian Gulf port congestion, which increased by ~7% between 27 February and 4 March 2026. Image reference: unnamed (4).png | assets/2026-03-06_strait-of-hormuz-from-vital-energy-chokepoint-to-pressure-point_img_unnamed28429_899d016ec7f2.png
Potential Scenarios

children.title: A Duration Framework
children.summary: The path of oil prices will largely depend on how long the disruption lasts. If tensions ease within about a week, Brent crude could stabilize in the $80-$90 per barrel range before gradually retreating toward $70 as the geopolitical risk premium fades.
